new_value: Updated success path in oscore_protect_request after *oscore_opt_len set to explicitly set ret=OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED before goto nvm_failed on persist_ssn failure (and OSCORE_OK on success). Matches security requirements for SSN handling. Verified in oscore.c:1583-1589. Tests confirmed via Zephyr path.
